ValidationRule.description: Do not let user edit historical months
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( ISCHANGED(Month_1__c),
fxFirstMonthInQtr__c < (TODAY()-5),
NOW() > fxFlowEditTime__c,
NOT( $Permission.C_PERM_9000_SIOP_Edit_Historical_Data ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_SIOP_ENTRY_001: You can not edit historical months past the cut off dates. Cancel and enter again.
